rationale: ADR-compliance lens clean across all six cited ADRs. ADR-0037 §3 single home holds: panel verify/tally, internal/complete, and instruct --panel-state ALL route through panel.PanelGateDecision; instruct's PanelStateEntry.verdict() is refactored to build GateFacts and delegate (the local GatePass/Warn/Block is a pure Action mapping, the only residual is Allow-reason synthesis, presentation-only). gate.go is byte-untouched by 110 (git diff empty) — no PanelGateDecision semantic change (ADR-0037 §8 trust boundary intact: no signing/hashing, plain files). ADR-0040: internal/panel is a verified config-free/git-free leaf (go list -deps shows no internal/config, no executor/gitutil); the panel.json + verdict-file + CLI verb surface is documented as the portability contract in workflow/interfaces.md § Panel Artifact Schema, pinned to code constants. ADR-0036: domain parity is the IDENTICAL normalizeImpactedDomains(nil, root, "", impacted) call plan.go makes; gate-forward doc-sync satisfied (4 workflow docs appended). ADR-0032: touchpoint check is existence-only (emits only adr-touchpoint-missing; no adr-coverage-*/adr-cite-irrelevant leaks to spec-approve — R7c boundary held). ADR-0034: verbs replace hand-typed JSON, add no ceremony step; tally hands off to the same mindspec complete terminal. ADR-0039: panelDirFor is layout-aware (DetectLayout flat -> co-located reviews, else repo-root review). ADR-0035: tally Block routes through guard.NewFailure with a genuine re-panel recovery line.
findings: ADR-0037 §3 (single decision home): VERIFIED. panel.PanelGateDecision is the sole allow/block interpreter across all four consumers (verify, tally, complete, instruct). No surviving second matrix; internal/instruct/panelstate.go verdict() now delegates. gate.go unmodified by the 110 changeset, so inputs/outputs of PanelGateDecision are unchanged (R7a).

ADR-0040 (config-free leaf + artifact/CLI contract): VERIFIED. `go list -deps ./internal/panel` has no internal/config or git; panel.Create takes plain CreateInput values (caller resolves resolvers + SHA). The artifact+CLI contract is documented in workflow/interfaces.md and pinned to panel.FileName/verdictFileRE/ConsolidatedName by TestPanelSchemaDoc_MatchesConstants (R4).

ADR-0035 (recovery lines): tally Block -> guard.NewFailure(msg, re-panel recovery) is compliant. NON-BLOCKING NUANCE: the new spec-approve validate errors (impacted-domains-resolve, adr-touchpoint-missing) surface via validate.Result FormatText, not the internal/guard formatter's strict `recovery: ` prefix. This is behavior-IDENTICAL to how plan-approve already renders the same impacted-domains-resolve error (R5's explicit parity contract), and ADR-0035's convention test scopes only exported internal/guard constructors — validate.Result is a distinct pre-existing path. Core ADR-0035 mandates are met (no panic, no bare non-zero; ApproveSpec returns a formatted pre-terminal error having mutated nothing), and the touchpoint message carries inline actionable guidance. The spec's ADR-0035 touchpoint prose ('must be guard-style failures') slightly overstates the implemented mechanism but the parity design is the correct call; no change required.

ADR-0032 (existence-only touchpoint boundary): VERIFIED. checkADRTouchpointsExist emits only adr-touchpoint-missing; no adr-coverage-* / adr-cite-irrelevant is emitted at spec-approve (grep confirms the only occurrence is a comment). Accepted-status/intersection/coverage stay plan-approve-only.

ADR-0036 (ownership-discovery parity + gate-forward doc-sync): VERIFIED. Identical resolver call to plan.go; every workflow-source bead appended a region to a workflow domain doc (architecture/interfaces/overview/runbook).

ADR-0034 (no new ceremony) + ADR-0039 (layout-aware reviews location): VERIFIED. panelDirFor honors DetectLayout (flat -> co-located <spec-dir>/reviews/<slug>, else repo-root review/<slug>), matching the ADR-0037 2026-06-24 amendment; verbs replace hand-typed JSON without adding a gate step.
